member.summary: Raises the CanExecuteChanged event.

member.summary: Converts PLC connection state values to brushes.

member.summary: One-way converter — ConvertBack is not supported and returns .

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcAddressViewItem
member.summary: Represents an address row displayed by PLC monitor UI surfaces.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcAddressViewItem.DeviceType
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC device type.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcAddressViewItem.Offset
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC address offset.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcAddressViewItem.BitOffset
member.summary: Gets or sets the optional bit offset. A null value represents a word address.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcAddressViewItem.DisplayName
member.summary: Gets or sets the user-facing address label.

member.name: M:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcAddressViewItem.ToAddress
member.summary: Converts this row to a PLC address.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcChannelViewItem
member.summary: Represents a PLC channel row displayed by monitor UI surfaces.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcChannelViewItem.Name
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel display name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcChannelViewItem.State
member.summary: Gets or sets the current channel state.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcChannelViewItem.Description
member.summary: Gets or sets the channel description.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcOperationLogItem
member.summary: Represents a PLC monitor operation log item.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcOperationLogItem.Time
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation timestamp.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcOperationLogItem.Operation
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation name.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcOperationLogItem.Address
member.summary: Gets or sets the PLC address text.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcOperationLogItem.Values
member.summary: Gets or sets the operation values.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcOperationLogItem.IsSuccess
member.summary: Gets or sets whether the operation succeeded.

member.name: P:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Models.PlcOperationLogItem.Message
member.summary: Gets or sets the result message.

member.name: T:Dreamine.PLC.Wpf.Services.IPlcMonitorService
member.summary: Provides an application-facing service boundary for a PLC monitor view model.

member.summary: Gets the monitor view model exposed to the view.

member.summary: Replaces the monitored PLC client.

member.summary: Adds a diagnostic log entry to the monitor.
